title: Communauté de communes Entre Mer et Lin
summary: The Communauté de communes Entre Mer et Lin was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in December 2001. It was merged into the Communauté de communes de la Côte d'Albâtre in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes Entre Mer et Lin was located in the Seine-Maritime département of the Normandy region of northern France. It was created in December 2001. It was merged into the Communauté de communes de la Côte d'Albâtre in January 2017.

Participants
The Communauté de communes comprised the following 17 communes:
